## 12. Licensing and reuse

### 12.1 Editorial content

License: {{CONTENT_LICENSE}} (e.g. CC BY-NC 4.0 / All rights reserved).

### 12.2 Citation format

```
{{CITATION_EXAMPLE}}
```

### 12.3 LLM training policy {#llm-training}

{{LLM_TRAINING_POLICY_LONG}}

Be explicit. Options used in the wild:

- "AI crawlers may index and cite, but not use for training without a license."
- "AI crawlers may freely use content for both indexing and training."
- "AI crawlers may not use content for training; indexing with citation is allowed."

Back this up with a matching `robots.txt` / `ai.txt` and terms of service.
